_comment: Per-tool prompt overrides for the mcp-django-user-path E2E spec.

juristai-django.list_my_cases.prompt: Use the list_my_cases tool from the juristai-django MCP server to show me my cases.

juristai-django.get_case_metadata.prompt: Use the get_case_metadata tool from the juristai-django MCP server. Use any case ID valid for my account, or 'test-case-001' if none are known.

juristai-django.list_action_items.prompt: Use the list_action_items tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.list_case_important_date.prompt: Use the list_case_important_dates tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.get_case_calendar.prompt: Use the get_case_calendar tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.list_case_timeline.prompt: Use the list_case_timeline tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.get_latest_docket_entry.prompt: Use the get_latest_docket_entry tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.retrieve_case_billing_su.prompt: Use the retrieve_case_billing_summary tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.list_legal_team_members.prompt: Use the list_legal_team_members tool from the juristai-django MCP server with legal team ID 'test-team-001'.

juristai-django.list_organization_member.prompt: Use the list_organization_members tool from the juristai-django MCP server to list my organization members.

juristai-django.read_people_dossiers.prompt: Use the read_people_dossiers tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.search_case.prompt: Use the search_case tool from the juristai-django MCP server to search for 'Smith v. Jones'.

juristai-django.precedent_query.prompt: Use the precedent_query tool from the juristai-django MCP server to search for 'breach of fiduciary duty'.

juristai-django.query_processor.prompt: Use the query_processor tool from the juristai-django MCP server with query 'What are key deadlines in federal civil procedure?'.

juristai-django.deadlines_insight.prompt: Use the deadlines_insight tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.

juristai-django.list_host_scheduling_sch.prompt: Use the list_host_scheduling_schedules tool from the juristai-django MCP server.

juristai-django.list_host_scheduling_eve.prompt: Use the list_host_scheduling_event_types tool from the juristai-django MCP server.

juristai-django.list_host_scheduling_boo.prompt: Use the list_host_scheduling_bookings tool from the juristai-django MCP server.

juristai-django.list_case_signatures.prompt: Use the list_case_signatures tool from the juristai-django MCP server for case 'test-case-001'.
